description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex set within a spacious, landscaped lot surrounded by fencing. The main building features a flat roof, clean geometric lines, and a mix of light gray and white exterior finishes, complemented by large windows and multiple entryways. The property includes several outbuildings, such as a detached garage, a greenhouse, and a smaller auxiliary structure, all connected by paved walkways and driveways. The grounds are meticulously landscaped with green lawns, trees, shrubs, and decorative flower beds, as well as a circular driveway and a patio area. The main entrance is accentuated by a wide, paved approach and a set of steps leading to a prominent front door. The overall design emphasizes openness, functionality, and a contemporary aesthetic with ample outdoor space.
description: A modern, multi-structure house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped grounds, featuring a main house, garage, greenhouse, and paved driveways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and left side of the house, highlighting the main entrance, patio, and a detached garage with a curved driveway.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and left side, revealing the backyard, greenhouse, and additional landscaping details.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front and right side, focusing on the main driveway, garage doors, and the primary approach from the street.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the rear and right side, including the backyard, greenhouse, and the back entrances to the house and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, paved entry with steps, a prominent modern door, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
